voter.notRegisteredWarning: You are not registered to vote. Please contact the election administrator.
voter.thankYou: Thank you for participating in the election

instructions.encrypted: Your vote will be encrypted and stored securely
instructions.blockchain: A hash of your vote will be recorded on the blockchain
instructions.onceOnly: You can only vote once per election
instructions.noChange: Your vote cannot be changed after submission

signVoting.howToVote: How to vote with sign language:
signVoting.step1: 1️⃣ Show finger sign for your candidate (1, 2, or 3)
signVoting.step2: 2️⃣ Upload or capture an image of your hand sign
signVoting.step3: 3️⃣ Click "Detect Sign" to verify your choice

signInstructions.clearImage: Ensure your hand sign is clear and well-lit
signInstructions.holdFingers: Hold fingers up (1, 2, or 3) corresponding to your choice
signInstructions.minConfidence: Detection must have at least 50% confidence
signInstructions.onceOnly: You can only vote once per election

signVoting.voteSuccess: Vote cast successfully using sign language!
signVoting.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload PNG or JPEG image.
signVoting.fileTooLarge: File size too large. Maximum 5MB allowed.
